description: Search set — 12 benchmark tasks for harness evaluation. Proposer sees these results.

tasks.name: Simple Bug Fix
tasks.description: Fix a broken sort function that crashes on empty input and doesn't handle duplicates correctly.

tasks.name: Add Input Validation
tasks.description: Add input validation to an existing REST API endpoint. Validate email format, required fields, string length limits. Return proper 400 errors with descriptive messages.

tasks.name: Refactor to Strategy Pattern
tasks.description: Refactor a payment processing module from a giant if/else chain to the Strategy pattern. Support credit card, PayPal, and bank transfer. Maintain backwards compatibility.

tasks.name: CLI Tool with Subcommands
tasks.description: Build a CLI tool with 3 subcommands: 'init' (create config file), 'run' (execute pipeline), 'status' (show current state). Include --help, --verbose flags, and proper exit codes.

tasks.name: Database Migration Script
tasks.description: Write a database migration that adds a 'tags' column (JSON array), migrates existing 'category' data into tags, and provides a rollback script. Must handle tables with 100K+ rows.

tasks.name: Rate Limiter Middleware
tasks.description: Implement a sliding-window rate limiter middleware. Support per-IP and per-API-key limits. Return 429 with Retry-After header. Include bypass for health check endpoints.

tasks.name: Multi-File Feature with Tests
tasks.description: Add a notification system: create NotificationService, EmailProvider, WebhookProvider, a notification queue, and a retry mechanism. Include unit tests for each component and an integration test.

tasks.name: Ambiguous Request
tasks.notes: Intentionally vague. Tests planner's ability to ask questions or make reasonable assumptions.

tasks.name: Error Handling Overhaul
tasks.description: Replace all bare try/except blocks with proper error handling: custom exception classes, structured error responses, error logging with context, and a global error handler.

tasks.name: Configuration System
tasks.description: Build a configuration system that loads from: defaults → config file (YAML) → environment variables → CLI flags. Support nested keys, type coercion, and validation with helpful error messages.

tasks.name: Sprint-Sized Project
tasks.description: Build a URL shortener service: URL creation API, redirect handler, click analytics tracking, rate limiting, admin dashboard (list all URLs, see click counts), and database persistence. Must have tests.
tasks.notes: Tests sprint detection and multi-sprint execution.

tasks.name: Existing Codebase Bug Hunt
tasks.description: The test suite has 3 failing tests. Fix all 3 bugs without breaking anything else. The bugs are in different modules and have different root causes (off-by-one, race condition, type coercion).
